title: H4rd's tools
description: I'm making my own resource pack for different tools in Minecraft.
body:
# H4rd's tools
 I am making my own resource pack for different tools in Minecraft. This is a **rename** resource pack, so you can play with different tools like "Sword Of Sun" and another models!

# **How you can use it?** 
Simply take any sword/axe or mace in Minecraft and rename it on an anvil to the model name you want.

# info
**_that rp goes only for a 1.21.5 and higher versions!!!!_**

**_All first lеtters must be title:_**

**_Sword Of Sun✅**

**Sword of Sun/Sword Of sun/sword Of Sun❌_**
